sp_widget.name: Incentive Commission Rules
sp_widget.template:
About Commission Rules

Commission rules define how to calculate the final payout based on the earning rule results. You can use lookup tables for rates, calculate quota-based commissions with tiered structures, or award bonuses based on specific criteria.

1. Flat Commission: Apply a rate from a lookup table × ARR
2. Quota-Based: Calculate attainment and apply tiered rates
3. Bonus/SPIFF: Award fixed or variable bonuses based on criteria

Phase 1: Data Gathering Steps

Calculate intermediate values like quota attainment, rates, and bonuses

{{c.steps.length}} Steps
+ Add Data Gathering Step
No Data Gathering Steps

Configure Data Gathering Step {{c.steps.length + 1}}

{{$index + 1}}
{{step.rate_unit}}

{{step.step_name}}

{{step.rule_type}}
→ {{el.label}}: {{step[el.element]}}
{{step.description}}

Phase 2: Payout Summary Rules

Combine multiple earning rules and data steps using formulas

{{c.rules.length}} Rules
+ Add Payout Summary Rule
No Payout Rules
P{{$index + 1}}

{{rule.name}}

{{cond}}

Grand Payout Summary

{{rule.name}} {{rule.operator || '+'}}
